assertions.description: No power regulator detected on this board - the v2.0 modular design splits regulation across boards but local regulation should still be identified
User interface elements (SW1, SW2 buttons) not identified as control inputs for temperature/mode selection
Inter-board connector pinout not analyzed for signal routing between top/bottom/USB/C245 connector boards
No USB differential pair detected despite VBUS power rail being present
REVIEW: Secondary I2C lines (__unnamed_26, __unnamed_27) detected as I2C SCL/SDA but with no pull-ups and only U3 as device - likely false positive or internal routing
